title: Project
description: A project registered in the Jengo world layer.

id.description: Unique identifier for this project. Kebab-case. Stable — other entries reference this.

description.description: One or two sentences describing what this project is and what it produces.

owner.description: ID of the person responsible for this project. Must exist in the person registry.

target_date.description: Expected completion or next major milestone date. ISO 8601 date. Optional.

repo_url.description: URL of the source code repository. Optional.

tech_stack.description: Technologies, languages, and frameworks this project uses.

dependencies.description: IDs of other projects this project depends on. Optional.

agents_involved.description: IDs of agents involved in this project. Optional.

notes.description: Notes useful for agent context: current blockers, recent decisions, scope boundaries. Optional.
